title: Hyundai India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hyundai India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hyundai India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
